ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the application */,
  "home_ownership" TEXT /* Home ownership status (e.g., Own Home, Rent) */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the applicant */,
  "years_in_job" TEXT /* Years in current job */,
  "tax_liens" INTEGER /* Number of tax liens on record */,
  "open_accounts" INTEGER /* Number of open accounts */,
  "credit_history_years" REAL /* Years of credit history */,
  "max_open_credit" REAL /* Maximum open credit available */,
  "credit_problems" INTEGER /* Number of credit problems encountered */,
  "months_since_last_delinquent" REAL /* Months since last delinquent payment */,
  "bankruptcies" INTEGER /* Number of bankruptcies filed */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., debt consolidation) */,
  "term" TEXT /* Loan term (e.g., Short Term, Long Term) */,
  "current_loan_amount" REAL /* Current loan amount requested */,
  "current_credit_balance" REAL /* Current credit balance on existing loans */,
  "monthly_debt" REAL /* Monthly debt payments */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "credit_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the applicant is in default (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* The current status of the application (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* The date when the application was submitted */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* The date when a decision was made on the application */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the decision (e.g., Insufficient Income, Poor Credit History) */,
  "recommended_loan_amount" REAL /* The recommended loan amount based on the applicant's profile */,
  "recommended_interest_rate" REAL /* The recommended interest rate based on the applicant's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_purpose FOREIGN KEY ("purpose") REFERENCES loan_purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_term FOREIGN KEY ("term") REFERENCES loan_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The user's date of birth */,
  "address" TEXT /* The user's residential address */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* The user's current employment status (e.g., Employed, Self-Employed, Unemployed) */,
  "employer" TEXT /* The name of the user's employer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user to whom the score belongs */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* The actual credit score */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit score was evaluated */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* The type of credit score (e.g., FICO, VantageScore) */,
  "score_range" TEXT /* The range in which the credit score falls (e.g., 300-579, 580-669) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan term */,
  "term_description" TEXT /* Description of the loan term (e.g., Short Term, Long Term) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Standard interest rate associated with the term */,
  "minimum_loan_amount" REAL /* The minimum loan amount for the term */,
  "maximum_loan_amount" REAL /* The maximum loan amount for the term */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the loan term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose of loan */,
  "purpose_description" TEXT /* Description of the loan purpose */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the loan purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit problem record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user experiencing the problem */,
  "problem_description" TEXT /* Description of the credit problem */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the problem was reported */,
  "problem_type" TEXT /* The type of credit problem (e.g., Late Payment, Default) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the problem has been resolved (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* The date when the problem was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_problems_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_liens" (
  "lien_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax lien record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the lien */,
  "amount_due" REAL /* Amount due on the tax lien */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the lien was reported */,
  "lien_type" TEXT /* The type of tax lien (e.g., Federal, State) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the lien has been resolved (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* The date when the lien was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lien_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_liens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bankruptcies" (
  "bankruptcy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bankruptcy record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who filed for bankruptcy */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date of bankruptcy filing */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of bankruptcy filed (e.g., Chapter 7, Chapter 13) */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* The date when the bankruptcy was discharged */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bankruptcy has been resolved (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bankruptcy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bankruptcies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* The type of notification (e.g., Application Status, Credit Score Update) */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* The type of feedback (e.g., Positive, Negative) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* A numerical rating (1-5) given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
